title: A New Doubles Membership For The 2018-2019 Season

content:
After consultation with representatives of the doubles community, we are happy to announce that we will be offering a new doubles membership starting now at the Edmonton Squash Club.

The doubles membership will cost $30/month or $300 for an annual membership. There is $30 registration fee including a $15 refundable fob fee. All doubles members have full access to the facility with the fob 365 days of the year from 5 AM – 12 AM, except there are no singles court privileges.

For further information, please contact the front desk or leave a comment below.
